summary: Raw, fixed-camera footage of Trump introducing his U.S. delegation (Rubio, Tim Cook, Elon Musk and others visible) to President Xi on the steps of the Great Hall of the People in Beijing, with a Chinese honor guard lining the staircase. It is a continuous protocol/greeting-line recording with no editing, genre styling, or song track; the high music_score reflects ceremonial/ambient audio, not a music-driven edit. Diplomatic event coverage, unrelated to immigration and not a youth-appeal produced piece, so out of scope.
